## Current Physical Tools & Pipelines

### 1. DaVinci Resolve Video Automation Pipeline
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/scripts/video_builder.py`
- **Purpose:** Automatically compiles video, ElevenLabs audio, and music into a Resolve timeline via the DaVinci Python API.
- **Usage:** `python video_builder.py <video_file> <voiceover_file> <background_music> <output_timeline_name>`

### 2. Self-Healing Diagnostic Server (MCP Failsafe)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/scripts/mcp_server.py`
- **Purpose:** Runs on port 8642. Catches terminal errors, uses Gemini 3.5 Flash to automatically write a Python patch, and saves the patch as a new [[.agents/skills/seo-geo/SKILL|skill]].
- **Patch Location:** `C:/Users/Curtis/.gemini/config/skills/healed_skills/`

### 3. Keystone Possibilities Local SEO Engine

#52603). Do not duplicate this schema on other pages; the root layout handles it globally.

## How to Add a New Tool
When you build a new pipeline, append it to this list following the same format: Name, Path, Purpose, Usage.

### 4. Sovereign Voice Engine v2.0 (Text-to-Speech)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/scripts/speak.py`
- **Purpose:** Offline text-to-speech via Windows SAPI5. Zero latency, zero cloud cost. Speaks through the workstation's physical speakers.
- **Usage:**
  - Speak text: `python scripts/speak.py "Your message here"`
  - Read a file aloud: `python scripts/speak.py --file report.md`
  - Female voice: `python scripts/speak.py --voice 1 "Hello Wayne"`
  - Adjust speed: `python scripts/speak.py --rate 160 "Slower speech"`
  - List voices: `python scripts/speak.py --list-voices`

### 5. DSPy Prompt Self-Refiner (Auto-Learning Loop)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/prompt_refiner.py`
- **Purpose:** Mines correction_journal.json for recurring error patterns and generates injectable prevention rules for [[.agents/skills/seo-geo/SKILL|SKILL]].md files. Ensures [[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|agents]] permanently learn from past mistakes.
- **Usage:**
  - Full analysis: `python prompt_refiner.py --full-cycle`
  - Inject into [[.agents/skills/seo-geo/SKILL|skill]]: `python prompt_refiner.py --inject path/to/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/docs/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/docs/SKILL|SKILL]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/docs/SKILL|SKILL]].md`
  - Analyze only: `python prompt_refiner.py --analyze`

### 6. Sovereign Doctor (Auto-Remediation in System Audit)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/system_audit.py`
- **Purpose:** Upgraded system_audit.py now auto-heals failures: installs missing pip packages, creates missing directories, and flags token re-auth needs. Also announces results through speakers.
- **Usage:** `python system_audit.py` (pass `--quiet` to suppress voice)

### 7. Working Memory (Tier 1 Ephemeral Task Cache)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/working_memory.py`
- **Purpose:** Fast SQLite key-value store for active task variables. [[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|Agents]] write [[STATE|STATE]]|[[STATE|state]] here during work; other [[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|agents]] read it on boot. Auto-expires entries after 24h. Completes the four-tier memory architecture.
- **Usage (CLI):**
  - Write: `python working_memory.py set video_id "abc123" --ns upload_task`
  - Read: `python working_memory.py get video_id --ns upload_task`
  - List all: `python working_memory.py list`
  - Clear a task: `python working_memory.py clear --ns upload_task`
  - Health: `python working_memory.py status`
- **Usage (Python):**
  ```python
  from working_memory import WorkingMemory
  wm = WorkingMemory()
  wm.set("video_id", "abc123", namespace="upload_task")
  wm.get("video_id", namespace="upload_task")
  ```

### 8. Fleet Orchestrator (13-Agent Command Center)
- **Path:** `C:/Users/Curtis/New folder/construction-website/Keystone_HQ/00_Master_Brain/fleet_orchestrator.py`
- **Purpose:** Master Brain command center for the 13-agent fleet. Scans all agent silos, builds live dashboards, detects content overlaps, promotes cross-agent skills, routes analytics insights, and sweeps learnings.
- **Usage:**
  - Full sweep: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --sweep`
  - Quick status: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --status`
  - Check overlaps: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --overlaps`
  - Claim a topic: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --claim "Bill 44" possibilities_brand`
  - Route analytics: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --route-analytics`
  - Promote skills: `python fleet_orchestrator.py --promote`
